stemHtml: Under which circumstance will you most likely change your heading?

options.a: Traffic at your six o'clock, 500 feet above you and opposite direction.
options.b: Traffic at your twelve o'clock, 500 feet below and opposite direction.
options.c: Traffic at your six o'clock, same level behind you.
options.d: Traffic at your twelve o'clock, same level and opposite direction.
